title: Polystichum molle
taxonomy: Polystichum molle is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns. This classification places it within the order Polypodiales, which includes other fern species with multiple leaflets. The family Dryopteridaceae is further classified within the division Pteridophyta, which encompasses all ferns. Within the Polypodiales order, Polystichum molle is specifically classified within the genus Polystichum, which includes a variety of species of shield ferns. The species Polystichum molle is native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia.
